body_text:
20:23 â July 21, 2020
ServiceNow Workflows for CEBA 3.0 Loan Application
We revised procedures for the CEBA Loan Application form in ServiceNow based on the expanded CEBA 3.0 program from Export Development Canada (EDC).
Note: Due to EDC requirements, now that CEBA 3.0 is live for the Group 3 clients who made it into our Wave 1 go-live slot, all existing CEBA 2.0 forms will be decommissioned.
For additional information and timeline details, see
CEBA 3.0 Now Live: Next Stepsâ
.

Section 2.1, Financial Institutions on MemberDirect or Forge Platforms
We updated content to reflect the new category for CEBA Application â Searchable; we replaced the image of the CEBA Loan Application form in ServiceNow to reflect the new fields based on CEBA 3.0 changes.
Revised
Section 2.2, Financial Institutions Using ServiceNow Workflow
We updated the procedures for filling out the CEBA Loan Application form based on CEBA 3.0 changes and replaced the image of the application form in ServiceNow; we clarified that financial institutions can approve or decline an application, but only EDC can reject an application.
Chapter 3, CEBA Application Categories
We added procedures on how to search for CEBA applications in the new category, CEBA Application â Searchable, under My Company in ServiceNow.
